title: Bare Bones - Better Chickens
description: Improved models and textures for chickens for Bare Bones
body:
This pack makes slight alterations to the vanilla Bare Bones chicken models and textures to make them look more like real chickens. This includes adding a comb and tail to the temperate and warm chickens, and making baby chickens look like chicks. Their eyes are also now visible from the side, and their nostrils have been removed.

The chicks do have little wings, though they aren't visible unless they flap them.

---

Requires [_Entity Model Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitymodelfeatures) (or Optifine).

Click here for the version of this pack supporting [_Fresh Animations_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-x-bare-bones-better-chickens). 
\
Note that it is _not_ and addon pack. You will not need this vanilla version if you use the Fresh Animations one.

---

![Two temperate chickens and chicks in a plains biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LQVRZZZ4/images/09a586717a073ba3935e20c24e0b6d9c20918f26.png)
Temperate chickens are given a small comb, and a tail. 

![Two cold chickens and chicks in a taiga biome, featuring small wattles and fluffy feet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LQVRZZZ4/images/7c221fd0803a06c644f54d042a553b6c9d6d7402.png)
The cold chickens' beak and leg colour has been changed to grey. Their wattle is now smaller and they have feathery feet.

![Two warm chickens and chicks in a jungle biome. Featuring spiky combs and long tail feathers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LQVRZZZ4/images/aef1b5ecb0e4519ecea1daf3bb1c2aa20da63bfa.png)
Warm chickens are given a large spiky comb and longer tail feathers. Their beak and leg colour is also lighter.
